ip_outcome_note: suspected_ip: 'Galar League Staff (Pokemon Trainer class)' — this is a Trainer class, not a named individual character. Bulbapedia confirms 'League Staff' is a named Trainer class in Pokemon Sword & Shield, the members of which staff the Galar Pokemon League at venues including Wyndon Stadium. The two figures on the card are generic representatives of this class in their canonical black-and-red livery. Verification outcome: the card depicts members of the League Staff Trainer class as defined by Game Freak/The Pokemon Company. Internal Pokemon IP, no external crossover risk. ip_confidence set to high.

trivia_bullets.text: League Staff is a named Trainer class in Pokemon Sword & Shield, the rank-and-file institutional workers of the Galar Pokemon League. Per Bulbapedia, League Staff members appear at Wyndon Stadium and other league venues; a male and female League Staff pair is also shown apprehending Bede in Stow-on-Side. [Bulbapedia: League Staff (Trainer class), via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Bulbapedia: League Staff (Trainer class), via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Oracle text: 'Draw 2 cards. If Wyndon Stadium is in play, draw 2 more cards.' The conditional draw-4 requires the co-printed Stadium card (VIV-161) to be in play, creating a two-card synergy combo within Vivid Voltage. This is the only Supporter in the set whose full effect is gated behind a specific Stadium. [PokemonTCG.io: swsh4-153 oracle text]

Illustrated by Emi Ando, who has worked across multiple Sword & Shield era Trainer Supporter cards. The card sits at no. 153/185 in VIV, eight positions below Wyndon Stadium at no. 161/185 — the within-set proximity is consistent with intentional thematic grouping of league-related cards in the set's Trainer block. [PokemonTCG.io: swsh4-153 metadata]

related_cards.name: Wyndon Stadium
